body:
## Problem The 10 individual gear item pages (`/gear/`) display Product schema and basic gear info but have **no internal links to drummer profiles** that use the gear. This means: 1. **PageRank dead-end:** gear item pages receive no PageRank benefit from drummer profiles, and don't pass any to them 2. **AI citation gap:** when an AI asks "which metal drummers use Tama Iron Cobra pedals?" the gear item page has no answer in its HTML (only the drummer profiles mention gear) 3. **Poor dwell time:** a user landing on the gear item page has no next-click destination to related content Compare to how drummer → band internal links work (#1172/#1186), or how technique pages list drummers who use that technique. ## Fix **File:** App.js (gear item page renderer — search for the component that renders `/gear/` pages, likely searching for the gearItems array or 'tama-iron-cobra') Add a "Drummers Who Use This Gear" section to each gear item page: 1. Create a data mapping `GEAR_ITEM_DRUMMERS` (in `packages/frontend/data/` or inline in the component): ```js const GEAR_ITEM_DRUMMERS = { 'tama-iron-cobra-900-double-pedal': [5, 7, 52], // Haake, Casagrande, Mangini 'meinl-byzance-series-cymbals': [5, 18, 47], // Haake, Halpern, Harrison 'paiste-rude-series-cymbals': [20, 19], // Hellhammer, Inferno 'zildjian-a-custom-series-cymbals': [1, 32], // Ulrich, Greiner 'vic-firth-american-classic-5b': [6, 34], // Kollias, Koller 'pearl-demon-drive-double-pedal': [2, 50], // Jordison, Priester 'tama-starclassic-walnut-birch-drums': [7, 60], // Casagrande, Talley 'pearl-reference-series-drums': [3, 11], // Hoglan, Paul 'sonor-sq2-heavy-beech-drums': [15, 38], // Duplantier, Lopez 'sabian-hhx-series-cymbals': [12, 26], // Benante, Larkin }; ``` 2. In the gear item page renderer, look up the drummer IDs, fetch their names/slugs from the drummers data, and render: ```html

Metal Drummers Who Use This Gear

  • Tomas Haake (Meshuggah)
  • Eloy Casagrande (Metallica)
  • Mike Mangini (Dream Theater)

See all metal drummers and their cymbal setups →

``` ## Expected impact - 10 gear item pages gain 3-5 internal links each → **30-50 new crawler-visible internal links** - PageRank flows: gear item → drummer profile (reverse of the existing drummer → gear flow) - AI citation: gear item pages now directly answer "which drummers use X" - Dwell time improvement: users can navigate from gear to a related drummer ## Quality gate - Each gear item page shows ≥2 drummer links - Links are crawlable `` for web) - [x] All 10 gear item pages have ≥2 drummer links (tama-iron-cobra: 6, meinl-byzance: 5, paiste-rude: 4, zildjian-a-custom: 4, vic-firth-5b: 4, pearl-demon-drive: 4, tama-starclassic: 3, pearl-reference: 3, sonor-sq2: 3, sabian-hhx: 2) - [x] Links are crawler-visible in HTML (SSR meta at api/meta/[...path].js renders `
  • ` tags; GearDetail uses `` elements on web)
title: SEO: Gear item pages — add 'Drummers Who Use This Gear' section with internal links to profiles
